action.reasoning: Observation: The previous iteration achieved 0.1234 exprate with DenseNet-121 and greedy decoding. Analysis: Beam search is a standard technique to improve sequence generation performance without retraining the model. I will implement beam search with length penalty in predict.py and evaluate the existing best checkpoint to measure the isolated gain of beam search. Decision: Update predict.py with beam search and submit eval immediately.
action.command: echo 'Evaluating beam search on existing checkpoint'
